title: ED files PMLA complaint in alleged visa fraud racket
content: The ED’s probe is based on multiple FIRs alleging conspiracy in the preparation of forged educational certificates, fabricated experience certificates, fake financial statements, and fraudulent proof of funds for securing U.S. student and visitor visas

title: Madras High Court nullifies registration of land belonging to Palani math
content: A Division Bench of Justices C.V. Karthikeyan and R. Sakthivel allowed the appeal preferred by the mutt against a Single Bench order that had directed the Sub-Registrar to register the sale deed if the document was otherwise in order

title: Four Ayush colleges will be set up in A.P., says Health Minister
content: Integrated AYUSH hospitals will be set up at Tirupati, Giddalur, Nandigama, Tenali, Tekkali and Rampachodavaram, with an investment of ₹90 crore, says Satya Kumar Yadav

title: As Sonam Wangchuk hangs on to hunger strike, weight loss approaches 9 kg
content: On the 18th day, activist Sonam Wangchuk continued his hunger strike demanding the resignation of Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan, even as his vital signs showed a worsening condition

title: Intense heat pushes power consumption to 280 MUs per day in Andhra Pradesh
content: Steps have been taken to ensure an uninterrupted power supply, and disruptions are being promptly attended to by the staff of the power utilities, says Energy Minister

title: Order CBI probe in TVK MLA bribery case and other horse trading complaints, insists a PIL plea before Madras High Court
content: The case filed by a Tiruppur-based lawyer has been listed for hearing before Chief Justice Sushrut Arvind Dharmadhikari and Justice G. Arul Murugan on Thursday

title: Andhra Pradesh student dies in road accident in U.S.A.
content: Prasanna was travelling in a car which lost control and crashed into a tree, resulting in her death on the spot

title: Another COVID-19 death reported in A.P., three more test positive
content: The death of 66-year-old man has been attributed to comorbidities, and not the COVID-19 infection alone

title: S. Janaki’s voice will echo forever, says Minister Kandula Durgesh
content: The government will introduce a comprehensive policy for the film industry soon, including single-window clearances for film shoots and support for infrastructure development, says Kandula Durgesh

title: Family of missing seaman want Centre to take steps to locate him
content: His family could not get in touch with him from March 26 this year when he was aboard the merchant vessel M.V. PERSISTENSE

title: NPCIL denies ‘sensitive data breach’ at Kudankulam nuclear plant project
content: Sources in the KKNPP say the alleged data breach has triggered ‘absolute commotion’ among the project’s top brass

title: Worker rolls shrink by 67.6 lakh in first fortnight after MGNREGS transition, finds LibTech
content: Analysis finds decline in registered and active workers coinciding with shift to VB-G RAM G; Rural Development Ministry counters claim saying it has received no complaints

title: Kalaignar Centenary government boarding, lodging facility in Vellore remains closed due to delay in fixing room rents
content: At present, tourists and patients from surrounding districts and States pay exorbitant rates for poorly maintained rental rooms in cramped private mansions and motels

title: Low demand for B.Sc. Mathematics and B.A. Economics led to the closure of these courses, says Ambur college principal
content: At present, the college, which is affiliated to Thiruvalluvar University in Vellore, offers at least five aided UG courses

title: Two get life imprisonment in Guntur dowry death case
content: Special court for the trial of crimes against women convicts two persons in a dowry harassment case that led to the death of a woman and her daughter in 2020

title: Robbery at ATM in Ranipet, ₹7 lakh stolen
content: When bank officials noticed that there were no withdrawals at the ATM, they reached the outlet and found its shutter closed from the outside

title: Man ends life in Palnadu; police deny allegations of harassment
content: Amid allegations that a note purportedly written by the deceased blamed police harassment, police say that wife of the victim was summoned to police station in connection with a land dispute case

title: Bengaluru: Police nab four inter-State drug peddlers who challenged cops; MDMA worth ₹34 crore seized
content: One of the accused, a Nigerian national, had allegedly posted on social media that he would continue peddling drugs in the State despite the police crackdown.

title: VIT gets ₹50 lakh endowment fund for student innovation programmes
content: The initiative will extend beyond financial assistance by offering industry mentorship, startup guidance, and leadership development opportunities

title: SC declines to interfere with HC relief to ex-DMK Minister E.V. Velu in Highways scam case
content: The DVAC registered the FIR against Mr. Velu, certain government officials and a contractor on June 24 based on a complaint filed in 2022 by anti-corruption NGO Arappor Iyakkam

title: TCS opens industrial AI solutions Lab in Bengaluru with NVIDIA
content: The new facility is expected to serve as a physical AI hub to accelerate the development and real-world deployment of AI-led solutions across mobility and manufacturing using NVIDIA AI Infrastructure.

title: Centre approves two multitracking projects costing ₹3,907 crore across Odisha and Jharkhand
content: The two projects covering four districts across the States of Odisha and Jharkhand will increase the existing network of Indian Railways by about 145 kms

title: NDA-ally National People’s Party seeks fortification of police station in Manipur’s Ukhrul
content: In a letter to the Home Minister of Manipur, the party said that a field inspection of the region, which saw a fresh wave of violence, had revealed ‘significant challenges’ confronting law enforcement authorities

title: Agnikul ropes in former ISRO chairman Somanath ahead of Mission 02
content: Mission 02 will fly a two-stage Agnibaan configuration in which the first-stage booster, after separation, will attempt a controlled descent and ocean recovery

title: Roads Ministry issues public consultation guidelines for highway projects after Public Accounts Committee makes recommendations
content: NHAI to register larger sub-contractors; MPs flag toll plaza facilities, traffic underreporting, and commuter concerns

title: Bengaluru: Apartment residents seek builder accountability, parking norms in new Bill
content: One stakeholder called for the Bill to prescribe clear timelines for conducting association elections and define the tenure of office-bearers

title: Pothundy twin murder: prosecution seeks death penalty for Chenthamara
content: Additional District and Sessions Court-IV Judge Kenneth George to pronounce sentence on July 16 after considering mitigation report submitted by DLSA

title: Supreme Court asks if panel monitoring the safety of people from the Northeast meets just for ‘talk and tea’
content: A court-mandated panel set up in 2014 after the death of an Arunachal student in Delhi; government records referred to a woman who could not be traced even though she had emailed a grievance to the panel

title: Mamata says Abhishek ‘fighting like a tiger’, vows to revive TMC
content: Trinamool Congress chairperson’s remarks are being seen as her strongest public endorsement of her nephew Abhishek Banerjee since the rebellion in the party, which has seen a majority of MPs and MLAs desert Mamata Banerjee.

title: Hyderabad Metro Rail to explore additional coaches, improve connectivity
content: HMR additional MD has called for coordination with Telangana State Road Transport Corporation and Transport department to explore suitable solutions for improving first- and last-mile connectivity

title: Proposed apartment law may not be perfect, but it is a good start: Greater Bengaluru Development Minister Krishna Byre Gowda
content: Mr. Gowda pointed out that the existing laws were enacted over 50 years ago, and the city had grown by leaps and bounds since then.

title: IAS officers reshuffled in Tamil Nadu: J. Radhakrishnan, Supriya Sahu transferred
content: P. Umanath, formerly Chairman and Managing Director, Tamil Nadu Civil Supplies Corporation, is posted as Industries Commissioner and Director of Industries and Commerce, replacing Nirmal Raj

title: PM Modi to virtually inaugurate upgraded Hi-Tech City railway station on July 17
content: The station, which has been redeveloped at a cost of ₹26 crore, features a 12-metre-wide foot overbridge, additional lifts and escalators, improved signage and other passenger amenities

title: Mysuru: Yathindra Siddaramaiah hints at induction of new faces into Cabinet
content: Dr. Yathindra said the Cabinet expansion had been delayed owing to elections to the Legislative Council and the Rajya Sabha, but expressed hope that the exercise would be taken up soon.

title: Yathindra Siddaramaiah reviews preparations for Ashada Fridays at Chamundi Hills in Mysuru
content: Though arrangements had been made for VIP darshan on Ashada Fridays, Dr. Yathindra said there would be no inconvenience to other devotees.

title: Ram Temple embezzlement episode has hurt devotees, says CM Yogi
content: Uttar Pradesh Chief Minister Yogi Adityanath accused the opposition of politicising the issue and lacking moral standing to speak on the matter

title: Bengaluru City Police Commissionerate to be split into multiple units?
content: While all other major city regions in India — Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, Hyderabad and Chennai — have multiple commissionerates, Bengaluru remains the only one where a large commissionerate, including suburban areas, is surrounded by rural district police units.

title: Govt moves to stem exodus from key Isro missions; at least 100 quit in past few months
content: Isro's Department of Space has introduced new rules for scientist resignations. These new regulations aim to prevent departures from key projects like Gaganyaan. The department now requires central directors to refer all such requests to DoS. This move reverses a 2020 decision that empowered centre directors to accept resignations. Isro acknowledges departures but states it is prepared to manage the situation.

title: FIFA World Cup: What triggered campaign against Lionel Messi and Argentina
content: An online petition demands Argentina's expulsion from the World Cup due to alleged FIFA favouritism.  Millions have signed the petition, citing perceived bias towards Lionel Messi and his team.  Critics point to controversial refereeing decisions and VAR reviews in several matches.  Argentina's coach dismisses these claims, calling them baseless accusations from detractors.  The winners of the Argentina-England semi-final will face Spain in the championship match.

title: UK backs India’s security concerns, says trade deal based on trust
content: The India-UK trade deal commenced, reflecting significant trust and cooperation between nations. This agreement is expected to boost both economies and enhance bilateral trade relations. Discussions also addressed national security and the extradition of financial fugitives. The pact aims to strengthen ties in defense, technology, and climate initiatives. Both countries anticipate increased GDP and financial trade following this landmark agreement.

title: Chinese AI founder Anthropic and OpenAI complained about is now richest AI billionaire
content: DeepSeek founder Liang Wenfeng is now the world's richest AI model startup founder. His net worth surged to an estimated thirty-six billion dollars after a recent funding round. This development follows accusations from US AI companies regarding improper model usage. DeepSeek's valuation increased significantly, and Liang retained a majority ownership stake. The company's rapid growth is attributed to its AI model performance and development costs.

title: J&K: Pika gun ammo seized from hideout in Poonch; combing ops continues in Rajouri
content: Security forces recovered 215 rounds of Pika gun ammunition from a terrorist hideout in Poonch. A search operation in Rajouri continued for a second day to trace two terror suspects. These suspects were captured on CCTV cameras crossing a road late Sunday. Joint operations are ongoing in forested areas of Rajouri and Poonch districts. These extensive combing operations aim to track down elusive militant groups.

title: J&K: In mourning, CM Omar Adhullah says Delhi protest is on
content: J&K CM Omar Abdullah confirmed the July 20 Delhi protest for statehood restoration. His party will travel to Delhi on July 19 to decide the next steps. National Conference invited 52 political figures for the planned federalism cause protest. Congress supports statehood plus, demanding land and job rights for the people. PDP has not yet clarified its stance on the National Conference invitation.

title: Jeff Bezos’ wife Lauren Sánchez leads $100M investment to transform 8 US cities
content: Lauren Sanchez Bezos is directing significant Bezos Earth Fund investments. The fund is transforming urban spaces into green community hubs. This initiative aims to connect people and nature within cities. The Bezos Earth Fund also supports marine protection and AI climate solutions. Overall, the fund continues its commitment to climate and nature initiatives.

title: India-UK trade pact day 1: India exports $140 m worth of goods duty-free
content: India exported over $140 million in goods duty-free to the UK on Wednesday. More than fifty export consignments were flagged off from over twenty locations. These shipments included electronics, pharmaceuticals, and textiles, reaching various global gateways. The Comprehensive Economic and Trade Agreement grants Indian exports nearly ninety-nine percent duty-free access. This landmark pact is expected to significantly increase bilateral trade between the two nations.

title: How elephants send messages through footsteps and hear through skulls
content: Through the ground, elephants send and receive vibrations, a unique way of communicating that surpasses traditional airborne sounds. Their anatomy, featuring sizable middle ear components and eardrums, allows for the efficient transfer of low-frequency signals to the cochlea. Intriguingly, they can also close their ear canals at will, amplifying their ability to perceive these low frequencies. This remarkable skill unveils the depths of their sophisticated communication systems.

title: From Kolhapur to Chanel CEO: How Leena Nair is redefining leadership
content: Leena Nair's journey from Kolhapur to Chanel CEO showcases impactful leadership. She broke barriers by becoming the first woman to work a factory night shift. Nair then rose to Chief Human Resources Officer at Unilever globally. She now leads Chanel, focusing on listening and human connection. Her leadership emphasizes compassion, audacity, optimism, curiosity, and purpose.

title: Oracle rating downgraded by S&P, now stands one notch above junk; reason is Sam Altman
content: S&P Global Ratings lowered Oracle's credit rating to BBB- from BBB.  The agency cited significant risks associated with Oracle's expanding AI infrastructure business.  OpenAI's substantial reliance on Oracle's services presents a key credit risk for the company.  Oracle faces potential financial strain from massive data center leases if OpenAI defaults.  The rating agency warned of further downgrades if leverage exceeds 4.5x.

title: Hurriyat Conference chairman Mirwaiz urges restraint as PoK unrest leaves 9 dead
content: Mirwaiz Umar Farooq urged Pakistan to defuse unrest in PoK through dialogue. He expressed anguish over civilian and police deaths in continuing unrest. Violence centers on a dispute over reserved seats for Kashmiri refugees in the assembly. Protesters want these seats scrapped, which Pakistan-based parties use for influence. Elections are scheduled for July 27, with a court ruling upholding the seats.

title: Horoscope today: Daily astrological predictions for Thursday
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for July 16, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: Who is Ashlyn Castro? Inside the life of Jude Bellingham's girlfriend and model
content: Ashlyn Castro, 28, is a California-born model, content creator, and talent agency founder who has been linked to Jude Bellingham since early 2025. Her background spans brand collaborations with Kylie Cosmetics and PrettyLittleThing, music video appearances, and a widely reported connection to actor Michael B. Jordan between 2017 and 2018. She has spoken openly about losing her father to COVID-19 and navigating her mother's mental health struggles, pushing back against years of fabricated stories about her personal life. At the 2026 FIFA World Cup, Castro has been a consistent presence in the stands supporting Bellingham's England campaign.

title: Erling Haaland stunned fans when he mentioned five girlfriends, but there's a twist
content: Erling Haaland's old "five girlfriends" comment has resurfaced, surprising fans years after it first made headlines. While many initially thought the Norway striker was talking about his dating life, he was actually referring to the five footballs he kept after scoring hat-tricks. The lighthearted remark highlighted his obsession with scoring goals long before he became a global superstar, Manchester City's leading striker and one of football's highest-paid players.

title: Dallas Stars could swap their $7.75m star for Red Wings captain: Report
content: Speculation on trades involving the Dallas Stars and Detroit Red Wings continues to build as the 2026-27 NHL season approaches. There’s been talk of Jason Robertson to Dylan Larkin in a potential blockbuster, but that’s all it is at this point. Uncertainty over contracts, roster priorities and trade tastes continues to shape one of the biggest NHL trade rumors of the off-season.

title: New crash clip of ESPN's Matt Miller sparks outrage as calls for action grow.
content: ESPN NFL draft analyst Matt Miller has found himself in major trouble ever since he had a brutal accident in Missouri wherein he lost his left arm which has left many shocked. While many sympathised with the popular analyst, Matt Miller has also been accused of defrauding fans as he has been accused of withholding prize money for fantasy winners. Amid this, the clip of his accident has sparked outrage among millions.

title: How Karnataka put eggs on the school menu, 6 days a week
content: Karnataka's midday meal program now regularly includes eggs for many students.  Around sixty-five percent of children opt for eggs, with bananas as an alternative.  This approach allows families to choose, respecting diverse dietary preferences.  Research supports eggs for nutrition and logistical feasibility in school meals.  Financial support from states remains a key challenge for wider implementation.

title: 'No dedicated EV charging point': Safety lapses turned Noida building into death trap
content: A fire in Noida's Mamura village claimed two lives and highlighted safety issues. An e-scooter charging on a regular socket is suspected to have started the blaze. Flames then spread to petrol vehicles, creating an inferno on the ground floor. Around fifty tenants were safely evacuated from the multi-storey residential building. The building's landlord was arrested following the tragic incident.

title: India and Pakistan to face each other three times? ICC's new WC format explained
content: The International Cricket Council's new format for the 2027 ODI World Cup has drawn criticism. This revised structure increases the chances of India and Pakistan meeting multiple times. Emerging nations face limited meaningful participation in the expanded tournament. The format aims to make every match more significant from the start. This change also allows for potential repeat encounters between top rivals.

title: SpaceX shares fall below IPO price for first time, wiping out post-listing gains
content: SpaceX shares have fallen below their initial public offering price for the first time. This decline reflects a broader shift in market sentiment and investor enthusiasm. Analysts point to concerns over interest rates and AI stock momentum. Investors are now awaiting SpaceX's first quarterly earnings report as a listed company. Upcoming events include the expiry of the IPO lock-up period and Starship test flights.

title: Bodybuilding influencer Mailson Araujo dies at 35 after final gym post leaves fans shocked
content: Brazilian bodybuilder and fitness influencer Mailson Araujo died at 35 after a medical emergency at his home in Alagoinhas. The incident happened hours after he shared gym photos on Instagram. His mother and emergency responders tried to save him, but he was pronounced dead. Araujo was preparing for the Musclecontest event, and the cause of his death has not yet been announced.

title: Patriots, Packers and Bears emerge as top landing spots for Cowboys' $100m pass rusher
content: Veteran edge defender Jadeveon Clowney remains an unrestricted free agent this offseason. And it’s July now! He is being considered as a perfect fit for several NFL teams like the Green Bay Packers, Chicago Bears, and New England Patriots. Clowney offers immense experience and disruptive pass-rushing production at a discounted rate, this is his USP. His market value is projected at a one-year, $5.7 million contract, according to Spotrac.

title: Repeated intimacy doesn’t mean consensual relationship, rules Madras high court
content: The court also cautioned youngsters and their families against ‘romance fraud’ and asked them to exercise utmost caution while getting into online or tech-facilitated relationships.

title: Caught on CCTV: Ghaziabad resident trapped, thrashed inside lift over society fund row
content: A dispute over society funds turned violent in Ghaziabad's GH-7 Society. A resident allegedly assaulted the former treasurer inside a lift on Wednesday morning. The incident, captured on CCTV, shows repeated kicks and punches. Police took the accused into custody after a complaint was filed. An FIR has been registered, and further investigation is ongoing.

title: US stocks today: Markets open in green despite Iran war tensions, oil price swings
content: US stock markets saw gains on Wednesday, driven by strong corporate earnings reports. Investors also reacted positively to recent inflation data, which showed a notable slowdown. This easing inflation reduced expectations for an imminent interest rate hike by the Federal Reserve. However, ongoing Middle East tensions kept global energy supply concerns elevated. Asian and European markets also posted gains, with technology shares leading the advance.

title: US issues new non-proliferation sanctions targeting individuals, entities in Iran, Russia
content: The United States has enacted fresh sanctions against seven individuals and entities linked to Iran's arms procurement activities. Targeting parties in Iran, Russia, Italy, and Nigeria, these sanctions aim to cut off financial support for Iran’s military. Consequently, any assets under US jurisdiction will be frozen under these regulations, intensifying efforts to undermine Iran’s military networks.

title: 'If Ramchandra married once, Rahim too should marry once': MP CM's UCC pitch
content: Madhya Pradesh Chief Minister Mohan Yadav strongly supports implementing a Uniform Civil Code.  The state government plans to introduce a UCC Bill during the upcoming monsoon session.  A committee submitted its report recommending UCC implementation, excluding tribal communities.  The chief minister criticized the Congress party for its stance on the UCC issue.  The government will also abide by the Supreme Court's decision on the Bhojshala dispute.

title: 'It's about standing up to invaders': Argentina vice-prez calls England 'pirate usurpers'
content: Argentina vice president Victoria Villarruel sparked controversy before the FIFA World Cup 2026 semi-final against England by calling the Three Lions "pirate usurpers" and invoking the Falklands (Malvinas), Diego Maradona and Lionel Messi. Her remarks came ahead of Messi's first-ever international meeting with England, as the defending champions chase a place in the final against Spain.

title: ‘Haiwaan’ release date: When will Akshay & Saif- starrer hit theatres?
content: Akshay Kumar and Saif Ali Khan will star in Priyadarshan's upcoming psychological thriller Haiwaan. The film's theatrical release date has been officially announced by the makers. New posters reveal Akshay Kumar in a robber-like outfit and Saif Ali Khan looking confident. The production house shared that some monsters live among us, ready for release. This tense, high-stakes thriller is scheduled to premiere on September 11, 2026.

title: Amitabh Bachchan's multi-crore real estate empire: Ayodhya, Mumbai, Dubai & more
content: Amitabh Bachchan has become a major investor in Ayodhya's growing real estate market. His Ayodhya land acquisitions are now estimated to be over Rs 90-100 crore. Bachchan's extensive property portfolio spans residential, commercial, and institutional holdings nationwide. His Mumbai properties include Jalsa, Janak, Prateeksha, and Vatsa, valued significantly. Overall, his real estate holdings across various locations are estimated at over Rs 500 crore.

title: 'Bumrah cannot be the answer to all your problems': Gautam Gambhir warned
content: India began the ODI series with a six-wicket victory against England. Jasprit Bumrah and Prasidh Krishna led the bowling attack effectively. Joe Root and Liam Dawson provided a strong recovery for the hosts. Shubman Gill and Axar Patel guided India to a successful chase. The team took a 1-0 lead in the three-match series.

title: RBI Grade B admit card 2026 released for Phase 2 exam: Check details
content: The Reserve Bank of India has released the Grade B Phase 2 admit card. Candidates can download their hall tickets from the official website. The examination is scheduled to take place on July 25 and 26, 2026. A printed admit card and valid photo identity are mandatory for entry. Candidates should verify all details on the admit card after downloading.

title: 'If Ronaldo, Messi can...': Ex-cricketer questions India's treatment of RoKo
content: Mohammad Kaif defended Rohit Sharma and Virat Kohli amid recent scrutiny.  He stated that successful teams require a blend of youth and experience.  Kaif questioned the focus on young players solely for their six-hitting ability.  He cited football stars Ronaldo and Messi as examples of older players excelling.  Selectors should value experience alongside emerging young talent for team balance.

title: JPMorgan Chase on track to become world's first bank with a $1 trillion valuation
content: JPMorgan Chase is nearing a $1 trillion market valuation, a historic milestone for a bank.  The lender's shares reached a record high after reporting its highest quarterly profit ever.  Analysts expect dealmaking activity to remain strong through the rest of 2026.  This achievement would place JPMorgan alongside major technology giants like Tesla and Meta.  The bank's diversified business model and strong leadership contribute to its impressive performance.

title: US Forces Launch New Wave Of Strikes Against Iran
content: The United States launched a new wave of strikes against Iran on Wednesday in a bid to curb Tehran's ability to threaten the Strait of Hormuz, the US military said.

title: Marco Rubio To Chair Global Meet On Far-Left Political Terrorism Today
content: The US is hosting an international ministerial conference on Thursday to discuss the resurgence of "far-left political terrorism" and joint action to counter the "renewed threat" to society.

title: 115 Fall Ill After Eating Street Golgappas, 12 Hospitalised In Rajasthan
content: Around 115 people, including a large number of children, fell ill after consuming golgappas (pani-patasi) from a street vendor in Polai Khurd village under the Simliya area of Digod subdivision in Kota district.

title: "Even Ambulance Can't Pass": Inside Noida Lane Where 2 Died In Building Fire
content: The incident has not only sparked concern about the safety of electric vehicles but has also raised serious questions about fire safety in congested neighbourhoods

title: "Fair, Equitable, Balanced": Piyush Goyal Praises India-EU Trade Deal
content: Piyush Goyal said the discussions in Brussels had reaffirmed the shared direction of the India-EU relationship.

title: New Port, New Pipelines: Gulf Nations' Billion-Dollar Push To Bypass Hormuz
content: The goal is simple, to reduce dependence on one of the world's busiest oil routes and limit Tehran's ability to influence global energy supplies. Before the conflict, around one-fifth of the world's oil passed through the strait.

title: 'Kidney Transplant Or Death': 5 New Mothers Write To President For Euthanasia
content: The development comes after their 48-hour ultimatum to district authorities expired without an assurance for kidney transplants.

title: 'Crossed Hormuz Safely': Pune Sailor Messaged Wife Hours Before Attack
content: The container ship GFS Galaxy was attacked early on Sunday when it was transiting the strait between Iran and Oman that is a global energy choke point.

title: Bihar Woman, Boyfriend Hire Contract Killer To Murder Husband On Train
content: Mobile phones and SIM cards allegedly used in planning and carrying out the crime have been seized, police said.

title: Man Kills Estranged Wife, Her Cousin Over Son's Visit To Parents
content: The three allegedly forced the victims into a four-wheeler, assaulted them with an iron rod and crushed their faces with stones before throwing their bodies from the bridge.

title: A Safer Ride To Work, College: Delhi Plans 56 Women-Only E-Bus Services
content: Women travelling to offices and colleges in Delhi may soon have dedicated electric bus services during morning and evening peak hours.

title: Karnataka Doctor Murdered, 8-Year-Old Son Stabbed At Home, Wife In Custody
content: The police said the wife is currently in a state of shock and has been making inconsistent and unusual statements

title: Rajasthan Teacher Makes Girl Students Remove Clothes Over Missing Rs 1,000
content: Parents also alleged that some teachers tried to pressure the students not to make the incident public.

title: Delhi Court Restores Two Weekly Video Calls For Umar Khalid
content: Khalid had approached the court seeking restoration of two weekly e-mulakats, contending that he had been permitted the facility ever since he was lodged in jail but that it had been curtailed to one e-mulakat a week from May 2026.

title: Trump Wanted '20% Hormuz Toll'. How Gulf Leaders Shut It Down In 24 Hours
content: According to CNN, US President Donald Trump's sudden announcement of the 20 per cent toll on cargo passing through the Strait of Hormuz prompted a frantic behind-the-scenes push by allies and senior officials to convince the US president to rethink the decision.

title: IRCTC Unveils New Ticket Booking Website After 2 Decades, Beta Version Live
content: The beta version can be accessed through the existing IRCTC website, where a dedicated link has been provided on the homepage.

title: Delhi Flags 70% Of 300 Large Projects, Sealing Action Likely
content: Property owners in Delhi may face recovery notices and sealing action after a preliminary government scrutiny found that nearly 70 per cent of around 300 large projects had allegedly secured building plan approvals without paying the mandatory charge.

title: Landslide Cuts Off Village Near China Border As Arunachal Floods Wreak Havoc
content: Nineteen Indo-Tibetan Border Police (ITBP) personnel, who had lost contact with their base from a forward area outpost during flash floods since Sunday in Kurung Kumey district, have reached the base camp.

title: Maharashtra Man Gets Life Term For Killing Wife Over Infidelity Suspicion
content: The accused attempted to mount a defence claiming mental illness, but the court rejected it due to a complete lack of supporting evidence, the release said.

title: Akhil Gogoi Expelled From Assam Assembly For Interrupting Himanta Sarma's Speech
content: Raijor Dal MLA Akhil Gogoi was expelled from the Assam Legislative Assembly for the remainder of the day during the ongoing Budget Session after repeatedly interrupting Chief Minister Himanta Biswa Sarma's speech on the Assam Budget 2026-27.

title: Indian truck driver Jashanpreet Singh jailed for nearly 5 years for deadly California crash
content: At TOI World Desk, our dedicated team of seasoned journalists and passionate writers tirelessly sifts through the vast tapestry of global events to bring you the latest news and diverse perspectives round the clock. With an unwavering commitment to accuracy, depth, and timeliness, we strive to keep you informed about the ever-evolving world, delivering a nuanced understanding of international affairs to our readers. title: Cabinet approves Rs 25,000 cr Ganga, Varuna corridors for Varanasi
content: the two roads to be built with a design speed of 100 kmph will cost Rs 25,446 crore . the projects are critical considering that the holy city gets more than 15 crore tourists and pilgrims every year . they will improve connectivity to major religious, educational and cultural landmarks including Kashi Vishwanath Temple, Banaras Hindu University (BHU), Namo Ghat, Ramnagar Fort, Ghats of Varanasi .

title: Doc killed in Dharwad flat; mentally ill son found injured
content: a 45-year-old anaesthesiologist was stabbed to death at his residence in Ranka Stello, Dharwad . his son Nihit was found severely injured in the pool of blood . he lived with his wife and their son, ophthalmologist Priyanka .
